# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

admin:
  access_policy_files:
    - path: /etc/envoy/access_policy.yaml

node:
  cluster: service-mesh

static_resources:
  listeners:
    - name: listener_0
      address:
        socket_address:
          address: 0.0.0.0
          port_value: 8080
      filter_chains:
        - name: chain_0
          filters:
            - name: envoy.filters.network.http
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http.v3.HttpFilter
                name: envoy.filters.http.router
                typed_config:
                  "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  clusters:
    - name: service_backend
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 0.5s
      retry_policy:
        num_retries: 3
      timeout: 5s
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: service_backend
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: backend-service
                      port_value: 8081

    - name: external_service
      type: LOGICAL_DNS
      connect_timeout: 0.5s
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: external_service
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: external-service
                      port_value: 8082
